steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: Amal imagines people as carefree while doing work. The quotation must show him perceiving work activity as joyful.

steps.title: Match the quotation
steps.content:
Choice B captures Amal observing the flower seller's daughter gathering flowers and attributing joy to the activity through physical details—glad feet, merrily jingling anklets.

The other three focus on Amal's own feelings or plans rather than his perception of others' work.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
